channel.title: Awesome Mac - 最近新增应用
channel.description: 根据中文列表整理的最近新增 macOS 应用。

item.title: Mullvad VPN
item.description: Category: 科学上网 App: Mullvad VPN Description: 注重隐私、支持匿名账号的 VPN 服务。 Website: https://mullvad.net Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 科学上网
App: Mullvad VPN
Description: 注重隐私、支持匿名账号的 VPN 服务。
Website: https://mullvad.net
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: Windscribe
item.description: Category: 科学上网 App: Windscribe Description: 提供广告拦截和节点切换的 VPN 与代理服务。 Website: https://windscribe.com Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 科学上网
App: Windscribe
Description: 提供广告拦截和节点切换的 VPN 与代理服务。
Website: https://windscribe.com
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: DNS Easy Switcher
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 App: DNS Easy Switcher Description: 快速切换 DNS 提供商或自定义解析器的菜单栏工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/glinford/dns-easy-switcher Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具
App: DNS Easy Switcher
Description: 快速切换 DNS 提供商或自定义解析器的菜单栏工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/glinford/dns-easy-switcher
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: ClipTools
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具 App: ClipTools Description: 方便快速复制、粘贴和整理文本的剪贴板工具集。 Website: https://macmost.com/cliptools Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
App: ClipTools
Description: 方便快速复制、粘贴和整理文本的剪贴板工具集。
Website: https://macmost.com/cliptools
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: SaneClip
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具 App: SaneClip Description: 带历史记录、隐私保护和敏感信息检测的剪贴板管理器。 Website: https://saneclip.com Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
App: SaneClip
Description: 带历史记录、隐私保护和敏感信息检测的剪贴板管理器。
Website: https://saneclip.com
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: uPaste
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具 App: uPaste Description: 自动整理剪贴板历史和常用片段的管理器。 Website: https://okaapps.com/product/1503649026 Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 剪贴板工具
App: uPaste
Description: 自动整理剪贴板历史和常用片段的管理器。
Website: https://okaapps.com/product/1503649026
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: Anvil
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: Anvil Description: 轻松托管本地静态网站和 Rack 应用的工具。 Website: https://anvilformac.com/ Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

App: Anvil

Website: https://anvilformac.com/
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: SaneBar
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: SaneBar Description: 带隐藏区域和自动化能力的隐私优先菜单栏管理器。 Website: https://sanebar.com Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: DynamicHorizon
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: DynamicHorizon Description: 为刘海区域加入媒体控制、通知和系统状态。 Website: https://dynamichorizon.app Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: Today
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: Today Description: 在菜单栏查看今天日程和日历事件。 Website: https://sindresorhus.com/today Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具

Description: 在菜单栏查看今天日程和日历事件。
Website: https://sindresorhus.com/today
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: FunKey
item.category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
item.description: Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具 App: FunKey Description: 为键盘输入添加机械键盘音效的工具。 App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/funkey-mechanical-keyboard-app/id6469420677?platform=mac Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10
item.content:encoded:
Category: 其它实用工具 / 菜单栏工具
App: FunKey
Description: 为键盘输入添加机械键盘音效的工具。
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/funkey-mechanical-keyboard-app/id6469420677?platform=mac
Commit: doc: Update multilingual app descriptions
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/b4c571e694758688e71f648375da21efd3610e10

item.title: LyricGlow
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: LyricGlow Description: 支持逐词发光效果的同步歌词播放器。 Open Source: https://github.com/ateymoori/lyricglow Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: LyricGlow
Description: 支持逐词发光效果的同步歌词播放器。
Open Source: https://github.com/ateymoori/lyricglow
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: TrailBase Description: 基于 SQLite 的开源后端平台，提供类型安全 API、认证和管理工具。 Website: https://trailbase.io Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Website: https://trailbase.io
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Capty
item.category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具 App: Capty Description: 内置编辑和标注功能的录屏与截图工具。 Website: https://capty.app/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
App: Capty
Description: 内置编辑和标注功能的录屏与截图工具。
Website: https://capty.app/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Screenpipe
item.category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制 App: Screenpipe Description: 支持 AI 搜索的本地屏幕与麦克风录制工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/mediar-ai/screenpipe Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
App: Screenpipe
Description: 支持 AI 搜索的本地屏幕与麦克风录制工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/mediar-ai/screenpipe
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Tight Studio
item.category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
